info.title: Doctor Clinic API
info.description: API for managing doctor clinic appointments, medical records, and prescriptions

get.summary: Get booked slots for a doctor
get.description: Returns future booked appointments only (from now onwards). Requires authentication.
Patients see own appointments, doctors see own, admins/receptionists see all.

preferred_date.description: Preferred date (Y-m-d). The day-of-week must exist in the doctor's active schedule.

post.description: Staff or doctor only. Triggers auto-confirm job.

appointment_date.description: Appointment date (Y-m-d). The day-of-week must exist in the doctor's active schedule.

start_time.description: Start time (H:i). Must fall within one of the doctor's schedule time ranges for that day.

400.description: Appointment is not in requested status

post.summary: Patient accepts or rejects appointment time

400.description: Appointment is not in set status

post.description: Transition from accepted to in_progress. Staff/doctor only.

400.description: Appointment is not in accepted status

post.description: Transition from in_progress to completed. Staff/doctor only.

400.description: Appointment is not in in_progress status

post.description: Staff/doctor only. Cancels from any status except completed.
Staff/doctor only. Appends message to notes. Status stays requested.

400.description: Can only suggest alternatives for requested appointments

email: The email has already been taken.

post.summary: Register a new doctor (requires admin activation)
post.description: Creates a doctor account with is_active=false. The account must be activated by an admin before login.

201.description: Account created, pending admin activation (no token returned)

message.example: Account created successfully. Please wait for admin approval.

email: The email has already been taken.

post.summary: Register a new receptionist (requires admin activation)
post.description: Creates a receptionist account with is_active=false. The account must be activated by an admin before login.

201.description: Account created, pending admin activation (no token returned)

message.example: Account created successfully. Please wait for admin approval.

email: The email has already been taken.

post.summary: Refresh access token using refresh token

refresh_token: The refresh token field is required.

new_password: The new password must be at least 8 characters.

post.summary: Get Firebase custom token for Realtime Database access
post.description: Generates a Firebase custom token tied to the authenticated user. The frontend uses this token with signInWithCustomToken() to authenticate with Firebase and read RTDB data.

get.description: Returns statistics based on the authenticated user role (admin, doctor, patient, receptionist)

post.description: Adds a new FCM token to the authenticated user's fcm_tokens array. Duplicates are ignored.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by first name, last name, or email

post.description: Admin-only. Creates a doctor with is_active=true immediately.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by comment or rater name

put.description: Admin-only. Sets is_active=true for the doctor user.

file.description: Specialization image (jpg, jpeg, png, webp, max 2MB)
Specialization image (jpg, jpeg, png, webp, max 2MB)

409.description: Cannot delete specialization with associated doctors

get.summary: Get a single country with cities

get.description: Returns paginated notifications for the authenticated user along with unread count.

delete.description: Accepts an array of notification IDs to detach from the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns a single notification. Automatically marks it as read.

delete.description: Detaches the notification from the authenticated user.

post.summary: Mark a single notification as read

post.description: Accepts an array of notification IDs to mark as read.

delete.description: Detaches all notifications from the authenticated user.

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by first name, last name, or email

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by name, description, barcode, or manufacturer

422.description: Validation error or daily limit exceeded (patients: max 15/day)

get.summary: List prescriptions for a medical record

post.summary: Create a prescription with optional inline items

delete.description: Cannot delete if archived/expired or older than 2 days. Cascades to delete all items.

422.description: Cannot delete an archived or expired prescription, or a prescription older than 2 days

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by type (user, service, center, appointment_system)

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by first name, last name, or email

post.description: Admin-only. Creates a receptionist with is_active=true immediately.

put.description: Admin-only. Sets is_active=true for the receptionist user.

get.summary: List patients assigned to a doctor

post.summary: Assign a patient to a doctor
post.description: Staff (admin/receptionist) only. Fails with 409 if patient already has a doctor with the same specialization.

409.description: Patient already has a doctor with this specialization

get.summary: List doctors assigned to a patient

post.summary: Self-assign a patient to the doctor
post.description: The doctor themselves can assign a patient directly without staff role.

409.description: Patient already has a doctor with this specialization

post.summary: Bulk assign patients to a doctor
post.description: Staff (admin/receptionist) only. Returns assigned, skipped (due to specialization conflict), and error lists.

get.summary: List available doctors for a patient (not yet assigned)

delete.summary: Remove a patient from a doctor
Remove a doctor from a patient (patient self-service)
delete.description: Patient can remove themselves from a doctor. Creates a cancelled supervision request record and notifies the doctor.

get.summary: List supervision requests for a patient

post.description: Patient or staff (admin/receptionist) can create a request.

409.description: Patient already has active supervision with this specialization, pending request exists, max 5 pending requests reached, or 7-day cooldown not elapsed since last cancellation

get.summary: List supervision requests for a doctor

409.description: Patient already has a doctor with this specialization

UserResource.description: User resource (admin, or base for patient/doctor/receptionist)
